title: justicia schomburgkiana
intro: Justicia schomburgkiana, also known as the Butterfly Pea, is a tropical flowering plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It is a type of herb used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing anxiety and stress, and improving cognitive function. Justicia schomburgkiana can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or added to food, and its herbal preparations have also been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
